failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, below required 39.6 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Adjust BPR to 40 bar to match system requirements

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 40°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Implement temperature control to maintain T ≤ 120°C

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at Q=2.79798 mL/min with BPR set to 40 bar for 60 min; monitor pressure stability
Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Conduct thermal stability test of solvent at 120°C for 24 hours; check for degradation products
